name: Cranberry Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Raw Cranberries or 1 cup Whole Cranberry Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, salt, baking powder, and soda.
2. In a separate bowl, cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add the egg to the butter mixture and mix well.
4. Gradually add the juice and rind of the orange to the egg mixture, mixing after each addition.
5. Alternately add the sifted dry ingredients and boiling water to the orange mixture, ensuring a smooth batter.
6. Stir in the nuts and raw cranberries (or whole cranberry sauce).
7. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan and bake until set.
